labels.label: FOR DE DYNAMIC EVENT HISTORY TABLES
Extracts table metadata into FlowFile attributes.
Scheduler Trigger To Start The Pipeline Periodically
Scheduler Trigger To Start The Pipeline Periodically
Uploads JSONL files to Apache Ozone via S3 API
Uploads JSONL files to Apache Ozone via S3 API
Extracts table metadata into FlowFile attributes.
FOR DE DYNAMIC RAW HISTORY TABLES
Uploads JSONL files to Apache Ozone via S3 API
Extracts table metadata into FlowFile attributes.
Splits discovered tables into individual FlowFiles
Splits discovered tables into individual FlowFiles
Scheduler Trigger To Start The Pipeline Periodically
Splits discovered tables into individual FlowFiles

entry.key: Max Length To Put In Attribute

value.name: Max Length To Put In Attribute

entry.key: Max Length To Put In Attribute
Max Length To Put In Attribute

value.name: Max Length To Put In Attribute

entry.key: Max Length To Put In Attribute
Max Length To Put In Attribute

value.name: Max Length To Put In Attribute

entry.key: Max Length To Put In Attribute
Max Length To Put In Attribute

value.name: Max Length To Put In Attribute

entry.key: Max Length To Put In Attribute

entry.value: SELECT current_database() AS db_name, cols.table_schema AS schema_name, cols.table_name AS table_name, cols.column_name AS key_column, cols.data_type AS key_type, md5(string_agg(cols2.column_name || ':' || cols2.data_type, ',' ORDER BY cols2.ordinal_position)) AS schema_signature FROM information_schema.columns cols JOIN information_schema.columns cols2 ON cols2.table_schema = cols.table_schema AND cols2.table_name = cols.table_name WHERE cols.table_schema NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema') AND NOT (cols.table_name ILIKE ANY (ARRAY['account', 'account_holder', 'condition', 'entity', 'transaction'])) AND cols.column_name ILIKE ANY (ARRAY['%credt%', '%created%']) AND cols.data_type IN ('timestamp without time zone', 'timestamp with time zone', 'text') AND cols.column_name IS NOT NULL AND btrim(cols.column_name) <> '' GROUP BY current_database(), cols.table_schema, cols.table_name, cols.column_name, cols.data_type;

entry.key: Max Length To Put In Attribute

value.name: Max Length To Put In Attribute

entry.key: Max Length To Put In Attribute
Max Data to Receive per Second

value.name: Max Data to Receive per Second

entry.key: HTTP Headers to receive as Attributes (Regex)

entry.key: Max Data to Receive per Second

Max Length To Put In Attribute

value.name: Max Length To Put In Attribute

entry.key: Max Length To Put In Attribute
Max Length To Put In Attribute

value.name: Max Length To Put In Attribute

entry.key: Max Length To Put In Attribute

entry.value:
SELECT current_database() AS db_name, cols.table_schema AS schema_name, cols.table_name AS table_name, cols.column_name AS key_column, cols.data_type AS key_type, md5(string_agg(cols2.column_name || ':' || cols2.data_type, ',' ORDER BY cols2.ordinal_position)) AS schema_signature FROM information_schema.columns cols JOIN information_schema.columns cols2 ON cols2.table_schema = cols.table_schema AND cols2.table_name = cols.table_name WHERE cols.table_schema NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema') AND cols.column_name ILIKE ANY (ARRAY['%credt%', '%created%']) AND cols.data_type IN ('timestamp without time zone', 'timestamp with time zone', 'text') AND cols.column_name IS NOT NULL AND btrim(cols.column_name) <> '' GROUP BY current_database(), cols.table_schema, cols.table_name, cols.column_name, cols.data_type;
SELECT array_agg(DISTINCT table_name) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('information_schema', 'pg_catalog')

entry.key: Max Length To Put In Attribute

entry.key: Max Length To Put In Attribute

entry.value: SELECT current_database() AS db_name, cols.table_schema AS schema_name, cols.table_name AS table_name, cols.column_name AS key_column, cols.data_type AS key_type, md5(string_agg(cols2.column_name || ':' || cols2.data_type, ',' ORDER BY cols2.ordinal_position)) AS schema_signature FROM information_schema.columns cols JOIN information_schema.columns cols2 ON cols2.table_schema = cols.table_schema AND cols2.table_name = cols.table_name WHERE cols.table_schema NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema') AND NOT (cols.table_name ILIKE ANY (ARRAY['dems_quarantine', 'pacs002', 'pacs008', 'pain001', 'pain013'])) AND cols.column_name ILIKE ANY (ARRAY['%credt%', '%created%']) AND cols.data_type IN ('timestamp without time zone', 'timestamp with time zone', 'text') AND cols.column_name IS NOT NULL AND btrim(cols.column_name) <> '' GROUP BY current_database(), cols.table_schema, cols.table_name, cols.column_name, cols.data_type;
